====Battle Tree====
Plumeria appears in the [[Battle Tree]] exclusively in [[Pokémon Sun and Moon|Pokémon Sun]] and [[Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon|Pokémon Ultra Sun]]. She uses three of the Pokémon below in [[Pokémon battle|Single Battles]], four in [[Double Battle]]s, and two in [[Multi Battle]]s.

{{Party

| class = Pokémon Trainer

| pokemon = 4
| table = yes
}}
